greeting: What can 8th Wall Agent do for you?

task.title: Task
task.closeAndStart: Close task and start a new one
task.delete: Delete Task (Shift + Click to skip confirmation)
task.shareWithOrganizationDescription: Only members of your organization can access
task.sharePubliclyDescription: Anyone with the link can access
task.connectToCloudDescription: Sign in to Kilo Code Cloud to share tasks

about: Generate custom components, modify spaces, and more with 8th Wall Agent. Check out the <DocsLink>docs</DocsLink>.
onboarding: Your task list in this workspace is empty.

boomerangTasks.title: Task Orchestration
boomerangTasks.description: Split tasks into smaller, manageable parts

stickyModels.title: Sticky Models
stickyModels.description: Each mode remembers your last used model

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Allow the AI to solve problems by browsing the web, running commands, and more

customizableModes.title: Customizable Modes
customizableModes.description: Specialized personas with their own behaviors and assigned models

modeSelector.title: Modes
modeSelector.description: Specialized personas that tailor 8th Wall Agent's behavior.

enhancePromptDescription: The 'Enhance Prompt' button helps improve your prompt by providing additional context, clarification, or rephrasing. Try typing a prompt in here and clicking the button again to see how it works.
dragFiles: hold shift to drag in files
dragFilesImages: hold shift to drag in files/images

checkpoint.initializingWarning: Still initializing... If this takes too long, you can reach out on the <forumLink>forum</forumLink> or try restarting your task.

menu.restoreFilesDescription: Reverts your project's files back to a snapshot taken at this point.
menu.restoreFilesAndTaskDescription: Reverts your project's files back to a snapshot taken at this point and deletes all messages after this point.

instructions.wantsToFetch: 8th Wall Agent wants to fetch detailed instructions to assist with the current task

fileOperations.wantsToRead: 8th Wall Agent wants to read this file:
fileOperations.wantsToReadMultiple: 8th Wall Agent wants to read multiple files:
fileOperations.wantsToReadAndXMore: 8th Wall Agent wants to read this file and {{count}} more:
fileOperations.wantsToReadOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to read this file outside of the workspace:
fileOperations.wantsToEdit: 8th Wall Agent wants to edit this file:
fileOperations.wantsToEditOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to edit this file outside of the workspace:
fileOperations.wantsToEditProtected: 8th Wall Agent wants to edit a protected configuration file:
fileOperations.wantsToApplyBatchChanges: 8th Wall Agent wants to apply changes to multiple files:
fileOperations.wantsToCreate: 8th Wall Agent wants to create a new file:
fileOperations.wantsToSearchReplace: 8th Wall Agent wants to search and replace in this file:
fileOperations.didSearchReplace: 8th Wall Agent performed search and replace on this file:
fileOperations.wantsToInsert: 8th Wall Agent wants to insert content into this file:
fileOperations.wantsToInsertWithLineNumber: 8th Wall Agent wants to insert content into this file at line {{lineNumber}}:
fileOperations.wantsToInsertAtEnd: 8th Wall Agent wants to append content to the end of this file:

directoryOperations.wantsToViewTopLevel: 8th Wall Agent wants to view the top level files in this directory:
directoryOperations.didViewTopLevel: 8th Wall Agent viewed the top level files in this directory:
directoryOperations.wantsToViewTopLevelOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to view the top level files in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.didViewTopLevelOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent viewed the top level files in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.wantsToViewRecursive: 8th Wall Agent wants to recursively view all files in this directory:
directoryOperations.didViewRecursive: 8th Wall Agent recursively viewed all files in this directory:
directoryOperations.wantsToViewRecursiveOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to recursively view all files in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.didViewRecursiveOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent recursively viewed all files in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.wantsToViewDefinitions: 8th Wall Agent wants to view source code definition names used in this directory:
directoryOperations.didViewDefinitions: 8th Wall Agent viewed source code definition names used in this directory:
directoryOperations.wantsToViewDefinitionsOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to view source code definition names used in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.didViewDefinitionsOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent viewed source code definition names used in this directory (outside workspace):
directoryOperations.wantsToSearch: 8th Wall Agent wants to search this directory for {{regex}}:
directoryOperations.didSearch: 8th Wall Agent searched this directory for {{regex}}:
directoryOperations.wantsToSearchOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent wants to search this directory (outside workspace) for {{regex}}:
directoryOperations.didSearchOutsideWorkspace: 8th Wall Agent searched this directory (outside workspace) for {{regex}}:

codebaseSearch.wantsToSearch: 8th Wall Agent wants to search the codebase for {{query}}:
codebaseSearch.wantsToSearchWithPath: 8th Wall Agent wants to search the codebase for {{query}} in {{path}}:

commandExecution.commandManagementDescription: Manage command permissions: Click ✓ to allow auto-execution, ✗ to deny execution. Patterns can be toggled on/off or removed from lists. <settingsLink>View all settings</settingsLink>

mcp.wantsToUseTool: 8th Wall Agent wants to use a tool on the {{serverName}} MCP server:
mcp.wantsToAccessResource: 8th Wall Agent wants to access a resource on the {{serverName}} MCP server:

modes.wantsToSwitch: 8th Wall Agent wants to switch to {{mode}} mode
modes.wantsToSwitchWithReason: 8th Wall Agent wants to switch to {{mode}} mode because: {{reason}}
modes.didSwitchWithReason: 8th Wall Agent switched to {{mode}} mode because: {{reason}}

subtasks.wantsToCreate: 8th Wall Agent wants to create a new subtask in {{mode}} mode:
subtasks.wantsToFinish: 8th Wall Agent wants to finish this subtask
subtasks.defaultResult: Please continue to the next task.
subtasks.completionInstructions: Subtask completed! You can review the results and suggest any corrections or next steps. If everything looks good, confirm to return the result to the parent task.

powershell.issues: It seems like you're having Windows PowerShell issues, please see this

autoApprove.title: Auto-approve
autoApprove.description: Auto-approve allows 8th Wall Agent to perform actions without asking for permission. Only enable for actions you fully trust. More detailed configuration available in <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink>.
autoApprove.selectOptionsFirst: Select at least one option below to enable auto-approval

announcement.title: 🎉 8th Wall Agent {{version}} Released
announcement.description: 8th Wall Agent {{version}} brings powerful new features and significant improvements to enhance your development workflow.
announcement.feature1: <bold>Message Queueing</bold>: Queue multiple messages while 8th Wall Agent is working, allowing you to continue planning your workflow without interruption.
announcement.feature2: <bold>Custom Slash Commands</bold>: Create personalized slash commands for quick access to frequently used prompts and workflows, with full UI management.
announcement.feature3: <bold>Enhanced Gemini Tools</bold>: New URL context and Google Search grounding capabilities provide Gemini models with real-time web information and enhanced research abilities.
announcement.detailsDiscussLinks: Get more details and discuss in <discordLink>Discord</discordLink> and <forumLink>Forum</forumLink> 🚀

followUpSuggest.copyToInput: Copy to input (same as shift + click)

browser.rooWantsToUse: 8th Wall Agent wants to use the browser:

systemPromptWarning: WARNING: Custom system prompt override active. This can severely break functionality and cause unpredictable behavior.
profileViolationWarning: The current profile isn't compatible with your organization's settings

shellIntegration.title: Command Execution Warning
shellIntegration.description: Your command is being executed without VSCode terminal shell integration. To suppress this warning you can disable shell integration in the Terminal section of the 8th Wall Agent settings or troubleshoot VSCode terminal integration using the link below.
shellIntegration.troubleshooting: Click here for shell integration documentation.

autoApprovedRequestLimitReached.title: Auto-Approved Request Limit Reached
autoApprovedRequestLimitReached.description: 8th Wall Agent has reached the auto-approved limit of {{count}} API request(s). Would you like to reset the count and proceed with the task?

autoApprovedCostLimitReached.title: Auto-Approved Cost Limit Reached
autoApprovedCostLimitReached.description: 8th Wall Agent has reached the auto-approved cost limit of ${{count}}. Would you like to reset the cost and proceed with the task?

versionIndicator.ariaLabel: Version {{version}} - Click to view release notes

rooCloudCTA.title: Roo Code Cloud is coming soon!
rooCloudCTA.description: Run Roomote agents in the cloud, access your tasks from anywhere, collaborate with others, and more.
rooCloudCTA.joinWaitlist: Join the waitlist to get early access.

slashCommands.title: Slash Commands
slashCommands.description: Create custom slash commands for quick access to frequently used prompts and workflows. <DocsLink>Docs</DocsLink>

deleteDialog.title: Delete Command
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the command "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
